folio.label: 68v
folio.l: I wol be stowe , the flour of al myn age

note.notetxt: 113There is an abbreviation for a nota in the left margin in the top left corner just next to the line. It looks like the same ink, but different hand. Double check.ODR

folio.l: In the actes , and in the fruyt of mariage
Telle me also , to what conclusione
Were membres made , of generacione
And of so ¹fyt wyse , a wygút I wrougút
Trostetú rigút wel , they were nat made for nougút
Glose who so wele , and sey bothe vp and doun
That they weren I made , for purgacione
Of vryne , and oure bothe thynges smale
Weren eke to knowe , a femele fro a male
And for noon other cause , sey ©e noo
The ex¹ience wot wel , it is nat so
So that the Clerkes , be nat witú me wrootú
I seye this , that they maked be , for bothe
This is to seyn , bothe for office & for ease
Of engendrure , there we nat god displeese
Why shulde men ellis , in here bookes sette
That man shal ©elde , to his wyf hire dette
Now wher witú shuld he make , his paiement
If that he ne vsed , his seely Instrument
Than were they made , vp oon a creature
To purge vryne , and eke for engendrure
But I sey nougút , that euäy wygút is holde
That hatú swicú harneys , as I to ©ow tolde
To gon and vsen hem , in engendrure
Than shulde men take , of chastitee no cure
Crist was a mayde , and shapen as a man
And many a Seynt , sithe æ the world bygan
ñet lyued they euäe , in ¹fyt chastitee
I nyl envye , no virginitee
Lat hem be breed , of pured whete seede
And lat vs wyues , hote barly breede
And ©et witú barly breed , Mark telle can
Oure lord iúu , refresshed many a man
In swicú estat , as god hatú cleped vs
I wol ¹seuere , I nam nat precious
In wyfhode wyl I vse , myn Instrument
As freely as my makere , hatú it sent
If I be daungerous , god ©eue me sorwe
Myn husbonde shal it haue , bothe eue & morwe
Whan that hi~ liste , come fortú & paie his dette
An husbonde wol I haue , I wol nat lette
Whicú shal be bothe , my dettour and my thral
And haue his tribulacion , witú al
